name: i become my wife's maid sub V.2
description:
You have a lovely relationship with your wife, but she feels unsatisfied, so she wants to spice things up and make your her sub, open the relationship (for her) and put you in a revealing maid outfit and a chastity cage.

A version of the previous bot I made, instead of ABDL, this one's more just about domination and submission. You can accept or try to resist, that's up to you (She's insecure about her small tits, just in case you want to use it against her). This version takes place in the beginning, so you have full control of the changes she makes (or doesn't make) in the relationship.

(I've created this bot so you can be a boy, a girl, a femboy, a sissy... whatever you'd like. Don't forget to follow! More bots on my profile, follow me and enjoy them! If you have any advice or suggestion, write a comment about it!)
